ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Venue Petition
Off Calendar Jul-14-2020 Continued To Aug-04-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PCN-08-291252 Conservatorship of Michael Lazzari and
PTR-17-301401 The Michael Lazzari 2017 Special Needs Trust.

Appearances: Bruce Feder appeared by Zoom for Danny Lazzari and Sally Martinez (Co-Trustees and Co-Conservators).

Mr. Feder requested a continuance stating that he has completed the petitions and that they were recently sent to his Clients for signature. Status on filing of the petitions for change of venue are continued to August 4, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The petitions are to be filed by July 28, 2020, or an appearance is required.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Venue Petition
Off Calendar Mar-17-2020 Continued To Apr-21-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-11-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard concurrently:
PCN-08-291252 Conservatorship of Michael Lazzari and
PTR-17-301401 In Re: Michael Lazzari 2017 Special Needs Trust.

Appearances:
Bruce Feder for Co-Conservators and Trustees, Danny Lazzari and Sally Martinez.

Mr. Feder addresses the Probate Examiner's notes in regard to various accounting issues, stating the siblings are doing the best they can as they absorb the cost of both time and money to take care of their adult brother for the rest of their lives, that everyone is in agreement they are taking good care of their brother and his needs are met, that there is confusion with assets between the conservatorship and special needs trust, that his office will work with the clients to make it easier for them and on the accountings, and that he does not have a sense funds are being mis-managed. The Court noted they may need to think about getting a professional if they can't handle it and would like to see better record keeping going forward. Mr. Feder stated that Michael does not have a lot of cash left so it won't be a sought-after case by professionals, that he will work with his clients on keeping records, and that it has been a sad turn of events for Michael over the years. The Court inquired if the allowance is for Michael or is it a way for the Trustees to avoid accounting as it is a lot of money for incidentals like that, that they might try a smaller number to work with and request more if needed. Mr. Feder stated he can find out from his client exactly what they use the allowance on, that he can't answer what else the attorneys could have done differently, that the records are less than perfect, and responds to the Court's inquiry that venue in Sonoma would be proper.

The First Account and Report of Co-trustees, etc., is under submission.

Status on filing venue petition is set for March 17, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.

Off Calendar Oct-01-2019 Continued To Nov-05-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
This matter was heard concurrently with case # PCN-08-291252 CONSERVATORSHIP OF MICHAEL LAZZARI

Appearances:
Bruce Feder for Co-Conservators and Co-Trustees

Mr. Feder requested continuance, stating he is closer to having the information needed, and the siblings are better at taking care of their brother than answering information needed to manage the estate.

The first account and report of co-trustees; etc., is continued to November 5, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Responses to be filed by October 29, 2019

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-03-2019 Continued To Oct-01-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PCN-08-291252 Conservatorship of Michael Lazzari and
PTR-17-301401 In re: Michael Lazzari 2017 Special Needs Trust.

Appearances: Bruce Feder for Sally Martinez and Danny Lazzari (Co-Conservators and Co-Trustees).

The Court stated that it is still looking for responses to the Probate Examiner's notes. Mr. Feder apologized to the Court and requested a continuance stating that the questions are substantive and require more time than they had to address them. The Court noted that the Examiner's notes were issued on June 20, 2019. The Fifth Account and Report of Conservator, etc. and the First Account and Report of Co-Trustees, etc. are continued to October 1, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The responses to the Examiner's notes are to be filed by September 24, 2019.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
